zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald West於1395年9月7日出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德時，他的父親Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West29歲，母親Joan la Warre32歲。他於1428年2月17日之前與Margaret Thorley在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年8月27日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可布洛阿德沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald West于1395年9月7日出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West29岁，母亲Joan la Warre32岁。他于1428年2月17日之前与Margaret Thorley在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年8月27日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可布洛阿德沃特。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald West was born on 7 September 1395, in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, was 29 and his mother, Joan la Warre, was 32. He married Margaret Thorley before 17 February 1428, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 August 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Broadwater, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald West est né le 7 septembre 1395, à Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan la Warre, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Thorley avant 17 février 1428, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Broadwater, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald West am 7. September 1395 in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West 29 und seine Mutter Joan la Warre 32. Er hat vor 17. Februar 1428 in England Margaret Thorley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1451 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Broadwater, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald West è nato il il 7 settembre 1395 nel Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan la Warre, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Thorley prima del 17 febbraio 1428, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Broadwater, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Westが1395年9月7日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスニッテルフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas West 1st Baron Westは29歳，母Joan la Warreは32歳であった。1428年2月17日以前にイギリスでMargaret Thorleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年8月27日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスブロアドワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald West(이)가 1395년 9월 7일 영국 워윅실르 스니터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan la Warre(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1428년 2월 17일 이전 영국에서 Margaret Thorley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 8월 27일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브로드왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.7 September 1395–27 August 1451: 7 de setembro de 1395–27 de agosto de 1451
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald West nasceu em 7 de setembro de 1395, em Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan la Warre, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Thorley antes 17 de fevereiro de 1428, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald West родился 7 сентября 1395 г. в местности сниттирфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan la Warre, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Thorley перед 17 февраль 1428 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 августа 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности броадвэитир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.7 September 1395–27 August 1451: 7 de septiembre de 1395–27 de agosto de 1451
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald West nació el 7 de septiembre de 1395, en Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan la Warre, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Thorley antes de 17 de febrero de 1428, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
